title: stelis capillaris
intro: Stelis capillaris, also known as the "threaded orchid," is a species of orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Stelis capillaris include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used in teas, infusions, or tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for medicinal use.
